zh_tw:
# oh-my-antigravity (OmA)
[![發布](https://img.shields.io/github/v/tag/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity?sort=semver&label=release)](https://github.com/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity/releases)
[![版本檢查](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity/version-check.yml?branch=main&label=version%20check)](https://github.com/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity/actions/workflows/version-check.yml)
[![授權條款：MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green.svg)](LICENSE)
[![星標](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity?style=social)](https://github.com/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity/stargazers)
[![Gemini 擴充功能](https://img.shields.io/badge/Gemini-Extension-0d8a83)](https://geminicli.com/extensions/?name=Joonghyun-Lee-Frierenoh-my-antigravity)
[![贊助](https://img.shields.io/badge/Sponsor-GitHub_Sponsors-ea4aaa?logo=githubsponsors&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/sponsors/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren)

original:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Antigravity CLI:** Gemini CLI will be replaced by Antigravity CLI on June 18th.
>
> If you previously installed `oh-my-gemini-cli` in Gemini CLI, Antigravity CLI will ask whether to import plugins during installation. Check that option to bring your plugin over.
>
> You can also install OmA directly with:
>
> ```bash
> agy plugin install https://github.com/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity
> ```
zh_tw:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Antigravity CLI：** Gemini CLI 將於 6 月 18 日被 Antigravity CLI 取代。
>
> 如果你先前已在 Gemini CLI 中安裝 `oh-my-gemini-cli`，Antigravity CLI 會在安裝期間詢問是否要匯入外掛程式。勾選該選項即可將你的外掛一併帶過去。
>
> 你也可以直接使用以下指令安裝 OmA：
>
> ```bash
> agy plugin install https://github.com/Joonghyun-Lee-Frieren/oh-my-antigravity
> ```

original: Context-engineering-powered multi-agent workflow pack for Antigravity CLI.
zh_tw: 一套由上下文工程驅動、適用於 Antigravity CLI 的多代理工作流程套件。

original:
> "Claude Code's core competitiveness isn't the Opus or Sonnet engine. It's Claude Code itself. Surprisingly, Gemini works well too when attached to Claude Code."
>
> - Jeongkyu Shin (CEO of Lablup Inc.), from a YouTube channel interview
zh_tw:
> 「Claude Code 的核心競爭力不是 Opus 或 Sonnet 引擎，而是 Claude Code 本身。令人意外的是，把 Gemini 接到 Claude Code 上時也表現得很好。」
>
> - Jeongkyu Shin（Lablup Inc. 執行長），出自一段 YouTube 頻道訪談

original:
This project started from that observation:
"What if we bring that harness model to Gemini CLI?"
zh_tw:
這個專案就是從那個觀察開始的：
「如果我們把那種 harness 模型帶到 Gemini CLI 呢？」

original: OmA extends Gemini CLI from a single-session assistant into a structured, role-driven engineering workflow.
zh_tw: OmA 將 Gemini CLI 從單一工作階段的助理，擴展為一個結構化、以角色驅動的工程工作流程。

original: Install from GitHub using the official Gemini Extensions command:
zh_tw: 使用官方 Gemini Extensions 指令從 GitHub 安裝：

original: Run a goal-style autonomous delivery loop:
zh_tw: 執行一個目標式的自主交付迴圈：

original:
```text
/oma:goal "Implement the requested change, update tests, and verify acceptance criteria"
```
zh_tw:
```text
/oma:goal "Implement the requested change, update tests, and verify acceptance criteria"
```

original: Note: extension install/update commands run in terminal mode (`gemini extensions ...`), not in interactive slash-command mode.
zh_tw: 注意：擴充功能的安裝／更新指令是在終端模式（`gemini extensions ...`）中執行，而不是在互動式斜線指令模式中。

original:
- **Durable Multi-Goal Workflows (Ultragoal)**: Adds `/oma:ultragoal` and `$ultragoal` to decompose complex tasks into sequential repo-native micro-goals.
- **Fail-Closed Checkpointing**: Keeps checkpoint state fail-closed under `.omg/ultragoal/`, blocking downstream goals until the active goal has validation evidence.
- **Diagnostics Hardening**: Updated `/oma:doctor` to validate `$ultragoal` skill metadata.
- **Version Bump**: Bumped project and extension version to `v0.9.1`.
zh_tw:
- **持久化多目標工作流程（Ultragoal）**：新增 `/oma:ultragoal` 與 `$ultragoal`，可將複雜任務拆解為依序執行的、原生於 repo 的微目標。
- **失敗即封閉的檢查點機制**：將檢查點狀態以 fail-closed 的方式保留在 `.omg/ultragoal/` 下，直到目前目標具備驗證證據之前，會阻擋下游目標。
- **診斷強化**：更新 `/oma:doctor`，以驗證 `$ultragoal` 技能中繼資料。
- **版本升級**：將專案與擴充功能版本提升至 `v0.9.1`。
## 擴充功能邊界與升級安全性

original:
- Install and update OmA through `gemini extensions ...`; do not rely on copied command/skill folders as the primary runtime path.
- Keep one authoritative OmA hook registration path per event. Mixing extension-managed hooks with manual duplicates is the fastest way to get repeated AfterAgent output or stale behavior.
- When OmA feels stale after an update, check `gemini extensions list` first, then refresh or reinstall the extension before editing shipped files.
- For long or multi-lane work, treat `/oma:workspace audit` as the default preflight before review, automation, or `team-exec`.
zh_tw:
- 透過 `gemini extensions ...` 安裝與更新 OmA；不要把已複製的 command/skill 資料夾當成主要執行路徑。
- 每個事件都只保留一條具權威性的 OmA hook 註冊路徑。將由 extension 管理的 hooks 與手動重複註冊混在一起，是導致重複 AfterAgent 輸出或過時行為的最快方式。
- 如果更新後 OmA 感覺還是舊的，請先檢查 `gemini extensions list`，然後在編輯已發布檔案之前先重新整理或重裝該擴充功能。
- 對於長時間或多線並行的工作，將 `/oma:workspace audit` 視為在 review、automation 或 `team-exec` 之前的預設預檢。

original:
- `/oma:interview` session state is now intended to live under `.omg/state/interviews/[slug]/` instead of one shared interview file.
- `.omg/state/interviews/active.json` tracks the current interview so resume/status commands stay deterministic without mixing separate requirement threads.
- This keeps multiple requirement-discovery passes in the same project distinguishable and archive-friendly.
zh_tw:
- `/oma:interview` 的工作階段狀態現在預期儲存在 `.omg/state/interviews/[slug]/` 下，而不是放在單一共享的 interview 檔案中。
- `.omg/state/interviews/active.json` 會追蹤目前的 interview，讓 resume/status 指令能保持可預測，而不會混雜不同的需求線程。
- 這讓同一專案中的多次需求探索流程可以彼此區分，且更方便封存。

original:
- `.omg/state/session-lock.json` is now the single-writer lock for shared workflow and operating-profile state inside one project.
- Only the lock-owning orchestration session should write shared files like `workspace.json`, `taskboard.md`, `workflow.md`, `checkpoint.md`, `mode.json`, `hud.json`, `approval.json`, `reasoning.json`, `hooks.json`, and `notify.json`.
- Parallel top-level sessions that do not own the lock should write session-local drafts under `.omg/state/sessions/[session-slug]/` and hand those notes back to the orchestrator for merge.
- Delegated worker/sub-agent turns should stay read-mostly and must not mutate shared workflow state directly.
zh_tw:
- `.omg/state/session-lock.json` 現在是同一個專案內，共享工作流程與操作設定檔狀態的單寫入鎖。
- 只有持有該鎖的協調工作階段，才應該寫入像 `workspace.json`、`taskboard.md`、`workflow.md`、`checkpoint.md`、`mode.json`、`hud.json`、`approval.json`、`reasoning.json`、`hooks.json` 和 `notify.json` 這類共享檔案。
- 沒有持有鎖的並行頂層工作階段，應將本地草稿寫在 `.omg/state/sessions/[session-slug]/` 下，並把那些筆記交回協調者合併。
- 被委派的 worker/sub-agent 回合應盡量維持以讀取為主，且不得直接修改共享的工作流程狀態。

original:
| Item | Summary |
| --- | --- |
| Delivery model | Official Gemini CLI extension (`gemini-extension.json`) |
| Core building blocks | `GEMINI.md`, `agents/`, `commands/`, `skills/`, `context/` |
| Main use case | Complex implementation tasks that need plan -> execute -> review loops |
| Control surface | Slash-command-first `/oma:*` control plane + 11 retained `$skills` (including `oma-plan` alias) + sub-agent delegation |
| Default model strategy | Configurable via `/oma:model` (`balanced` lane split uses `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` / `gemini-3-flash-preview` / `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` by default, with optional `auto` or `custom` overrides) |
zh_tw:
| 項目 | 摘要 |
| --- | --- |
| 發佈模式 | 官方 Gemini CLI 擴充功能（`gemini-extension.json`） |
| 核心構件 | `GEMINI.md`、`agents/`、`commands/`、`skills/`、`context/` |
| 主要用途 | 需要 plan -> execute -> review 迴圈的複雜實作任務 |
| 控制面 | 以斜線指令為先的 `/oma:*` 控制平面 + 11 個保留的 `$skills`（包括 `oma-plan` 別名）+ 子代理委派 |
| 預設模型策略 | 可透過 `/oma:model` 設定（`balanced` 分流預設使用 `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` / `gemini-3-flash-preview` / `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview`，並可選擇 `auto` 或 `custom` 覆寫） |
